title: Intensely Peppery Russian Beef Pasta
description: A hearty, peppery Russian dish featuring tender beef and pappardelle pasta, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This Whole30-friendly recipe is made with wholesome ingredients and tempered with dark chocolate for added depth.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium-high heat and sear the beef strips until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside, then add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the freshly ground black peppercorns and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked beef back into the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and pepper mixture.
Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Temper the chocolate by stirring it into the beef and onion mixture, then season with sea salt to taste.
Combine the cooked pappardelle pasta and beef mixture, tossing to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with additional black pepper if desired.
